question: Is the property mark used for denoting that movable property belongs to a particular person?

yes.question: Is the mark used to cause injury to any person?

yes.name: Tampering with property mark with intent to cause injury

no.question: Is the mark used by a public servant or any mark used by a public servant to denote that any property has been?
Is the mark used to denote that any goods belong to a person to whom they do not belong?

yes.name: Making or possession of any instrument for counterfeiting a property mark

no.question: Is the mark a counterfeit property mark?

yes.name: Selling goods marked with a counterfeit property mark

no.question: Is the mark made upon any case, package or other receptacle containing goods?

yes.name: Making a false mark upon any receptacle containing goods

sections.name: Tampering with property mark with intent to cause injury.
Making or possession of any instrument for counterfeiting a property mark.
Selling goods marked with a counterfeit property mark.
Making a false mark upon any receptacle containing goods.
